privileged_info_summary: Invoice 1 belongs to Customer 2 (Leonie Köhler) and contains two tracks: Track 2 'Balls to the Wall' priced at $0.99 and Track 4 'Restless and Wild' also priced at $0.99. The invoice currently totals $1.98. The task requires splitting this into two separate invoices for the same customer, with each invoice containing one track at a price of $0.99. Customer 2's billing address is Theodor-Heuss-Straße 34, Stuttgart, Germany, postal code 70174.
